title: ExecutionResult
description: Output from executor after attempting to execute a ValidatedAction. Deterministic representation of execution outcome.

run_id.description: UUID v7 - unique identifier for this execution attempt

session_id.description: UUID v7 - groups all attempts for this task across retries

task_id.description: Deterministic task identifier: SHA-256(message_id + action + action_version + canonical payload)

attempt.description: Attempt number (1-indexed). First attempt = 1, retry = 2, etc.

status.description: Execution outcome: success (completed), failure (retryable error), dead (non-retryable or max attempts)

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution started (UTC, recorded time)

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution finished (UTC, recorded time)

retryable.description: If status=failure, can this be retried? If status=dead, this is always false.

error_code.description: Error code if status != success. Null for success.

error_message.description: Human-readable error message if status != success. Null for success.

error_details.description: Structured error details (exception type, stack trace, etc.). Null for success.

artifacts.description: Action-specific output artifacts. For fs.read: {content, bytes_read}. For fs.list_dir: {entries}. Null if status != success.

snapshot_id.description: Snapshot identifier created before execution (for rollback). Null if snapshot not created.

rollback_id.description: Rollback operation identifier if rollback was performed. Null if no rollback.

sandbox_id.description: Sandbox identifier for this execution attempt

handler_duration_ms.description: Time spent in handler execution (milliseconds). Null if handler never started.

total_duration_ms.description: Total time from task start to finish (milliseconds)

signature.description: Ed25519 signature of canonical ExecutionResult (Phase 3). Null in Phase 2.
